debug_info.goal:
case hp
ι : Type u_1
inst✝ : UnitalFreeStateTheory ι
i : ι
ρ : MState (H i)
σ : (n : ℕ) → ↑IsFree
ε ε' : Prob
hε'₁ : 0 < ε'
hε'₂ : ε' < ε
hε : ε < 1
hR1R2 : @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε < @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ
hR1 : @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε ≠ ⊤
hR2 : @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ ≠ ⊤
hε₀✝ : 0 < @SteinsLemma.ε₀_func✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε σ ε'
m : ℕ
hm :
  m ≥ 1 ∧ 𝐃(statePow ρ m‖↑(σ m)) / ↑m < @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ + ↑⟨@SteinsLemma.ε₀_func✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε σ ε', ⋯⟩
ℰ : (n : ℕ) → CPTPMap (H (i ^ n)) (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := fun n => pinching_map (@SteinsLemma.σ''✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε m σ n)
ε₀ : ℝ := @SteinsLemma.ε₀_func✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε σ ε'
hε₀ : 0 < ε₀
hε₀' : ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) ≤ ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀
hliminf_le :
  Filter.liminf
      (fun n => (OptimalHypothesisRate ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) ε {@SteinsLemma.σ''✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε m σ n}).negLog / ↑n)
      Filter.atTop ≤
    ↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε))
hlimsup_le :
  ∀ (ε1 : Prob),
    0 < ↑ε1 ∧ ↑ε1 < 1 →
      Filter.limsup
          (fun n =>
            (OptimalHypothesisRate ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) (1 - ε1) {@SteinsLemma.σ''✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε m σ n}).negLog / ↑n)
          Filter.atTop ≤
        ↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ⟨ε₀, ⋯⟩)
P1 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ :=
  fun ε2 n =>
    (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2)) •
          ↑(@SteinsLemma.σ''✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε m σ n)).proj_le
      ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))
P2 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ :=
  fun ε2 n =>
    (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)) •
          ↑(@SteinsLemma.σ''✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε m σ n)).proj_le
      ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))
hPcomm : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), Commute ↑(P1 ε2 n) ↑(P2 ε2 n)
E1 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := 1 - P1
E2 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := P1 - P2
E3 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := P2
Esum : E1 + E2 + E3 = 1
hE1proj :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    E1 ε2 n =
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).proj_lt
        (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2)) •
          ↑(@SteinsLemma.σ''✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε m σ n))
hE2leProj :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    E2 ε2 n ≤
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).proj_lt
        (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)) •
          ↑(@SteinsLemma.σ''✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε m σ n))
c' : ℝ → ℕ → ℝ :=
  fun ε2 n =>
    max (@SteinsLemma.σ₁_c✝ ι inst✝ i n + @SteinsLemma.σ₁_c✝¹ ι inst✝ i n / ↑n)
      (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)
hc' : ∀ (ε2 : ℕ → NNReal), (∀ (n : ℕ), ε2 n < 1) → ∃ C, ∀ᶠ (n : ℕ) in Filter.atTop, c' (↑(ε2 n)) n ≤ ↑C
hσ'' : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), Real.exp (-↑n * c' ε2 n) • 1 ≤ ↑(@SteinsLemma.σ''✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε m σ n)
hE3commℰ : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), Commute ↑(E3 ε2 n) ↑(↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).log
ε2 : ℝ
n : ℕ
hε2 : 0 < ε2
hn : 0 < n
hE3leq :
  (1 / ↑n) • ↑(E3 ε2 n) * (↑(↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).log - ↑(↑(@SteinsLemma.σ''✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε m σ n)).log) ≤
    c' ε2 n • ↑(E3 ε2 n)
⊢ 0 ≤
    ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) -
      ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝¹ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) * (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).inner (P1 ε2 n)
